message:
fix(tools): improve error messages for missing external binaries

Clarify error messages when ripgrep (rg) or fd-find (fd) are not available:

- grep tool: Changed from "ripgrep (rg) is not available and could not be
  downloaded" to "ripgrep (rg) is not available (please install ripgrep)"
- find tool: Changed from "fd is not available and could not be downloaded"
  to "fd is not available (please install fd-find or fd)"

The previous messages implied automatic download was attempted and failed.
The new messages are simpler and provide actionable guidance for users
to install the required dependencies through their package manager.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
